resolved.reason: Re-reviewed 2026-04-28. Spec now contains five requirements: Conformance Mode, Evaluation Mode, Simulation Mode (all three explicitly excluded by prototype-scope.spec.md), plus two new requirements: Cascade Depth (part of Simulation Mode, still excluded) and Mode Composition (depends on all three modes, all still excluded). No requirement is referenced by any prototype spec for implementation. The Cascade Depth schema field is addressed by task-072 via scene-graph-schema.spec.md, which is an extraction spec that independently mandates the field. PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED: also blocked by check-assigned-spec-in-scope.sh (prohibited path list). Do not assign tasks from this spec.
resolved.reopen_condition: prototype-scope.spec.md un-excludes at least one of: Conformance Mode, Evaluation Mode, Simulation Mode

resolved.reason: PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED. Spec describes moldable views (LLM-powered question-driven views), explicitly excluded from prototype by specs/prototype/prototype-scope.spec.md line 93. check-assigned-spec-in-scope.sh exits non-zero for this spec path. task-024 is the existing closure record. Mis-assigned 8 times historically. Do not assign tasks from this spec under any framing.
resolved.reopen_condition: prototype-scope.spec.md un-excludes moldable views (LLM-powered question-driven views)

resolved.reason: All in-scope Extraction Layer and Composition Layer requirements covered by tasks 002–004, 012–014, 019–020, 023, 025–027, 029–030, 032–033, 036–038. Overlay/Facet Composition (LLM-driven), Data Flow Spine (feeds out-of-scope data flow viz), Route Primitive (LLM-driven), and Purpose-Level Annotation (LLM-driven) excluded from prototype. Confirmed fully covered 2026-05-02.

resolved.reason: All 7 requirements covered by tasks 001, 006–011. Cascade Depth in Simulation Output is simulation mode — NOT implemented per prototype-scope.spec.md line 91. Confirmed fully covered 2026-05-02.
